name: Keyhole
description: Keyholes punched into the field, re-inking on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--color0); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 22%; @size: 38%; margin-left: -19%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 42%; top: 46%; width: 16%; height: 36%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
